stories.title: Copy of NBA playoff takeaways: OKC takes Game 2 at home
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next for the Spurs-Thunder and Knicks-Cavaliers series.

stories.title: Thunder tie series as SGA bounces back with 30
stories.summary: As they did twice during last season's title run, the Thunder bounced back from a series-opening loss, getting 30 points from Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and forcing 21 turnovers to even the series against the Spurs in Game 2.

stories.title: Spurs, already minus Fox, lose Harper (hammy)
stories.summary: Spurs guard Dylan Harper suffered a right hamstring injury in Wednesday night's loss in Game 2 of the Western Conference finals against the Thunder.

stories.title: Eagles LB Smith arrested after car clocked at 135
stories.summary: Eagles linebacker Nolan Smith Jr. was arrested Friday and accused of speeding and reckless driving in Georgia, the Twiggs County Sheriff's Office told ESPN on Wednesday.

stories.title: Orgeron back to LSU as assistant on Kiffin's staff...
stories.summary: Ed Orgeron, who led LSU to a football national championship in 2019, is returning to the program as a special assistant to recruiting and defense on longtime friend Lane Kiffin's coaching staff.
